rationale: Educ. Code §29.3615 governs special education evaluations and IEPs for children not enrolled in school districts. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The parent of a child who is not enrolled in a school district or open-enrollment charter school may request that a school district conduct a full individual and initial evaluation of the child
_note: No overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this special education provision.
